title: BEM-892 contour processing
objective:
Run script:
"""
for p in ['governance/worker/results/WRK-C1','governance/worker/results/WRK-C2','governance/worker/results/WRK-C3','governance/worker/outbox','governance/tools','governance/reports','governance/runtime/curator_dispatch']:
    Path(p).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
processed = []
errors = []
for contour in ['WRK-C1','WRK-C2','WRK-C3']:
    inbox_dir = Path('governance/worker/inbox') / contour
    for inbox_file in inbox_dir.glob('*.json'):
        task = json.loads(inbox_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
        result = {
          'result_id':'RES-' + task.get('dispatch_id','unknown'),
          'dispatch_id':task.get('dispatch_id'),
          'task_id':task.get('task_id'),
          'trace_id':'bem892_contour_processing',
          'source_contour':contour,
          'source_object':'OBJ-WRK-001',
          'source_curator':'EL-CUR-WRK-001',
          'target_object':'OBJ-DIR-001',
          'target_curator':'EL-CUR-DIR-001',
          'status':'completed',
          'payload_ref':task.get('payload_ref'),
          'proof':'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM892_CONTOUR_PROCESSING_PASS.md',
          'completed_at_utc3':'2026-05-30T06:49:00+03:00'
        }
        result_file = Path('governance/worker/results') / contour / (result['result_id'] + '.json')
        result_file.write_text(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
        outbox_file = Path('governance/worker/outbox') / (result['result_id'] + '.json')
        outbox_file.write_text(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
        processed.append(str(result_file))

queue_path = Path('governance/dispatch/dispatch_queue.jsonl')
if queue_path.exists():
    items = [json.loads(x) for x in queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines() if x.strip()]
    for item in items:
        if any(('RES-' + item.get('dispatch_id','')) in p for p in processed):
            item['status'] = 'completed'
            item['result_ref'] = 'governance/worker/outbox/RES-' + item.get('dispatch_id','') + '.json'
    queue_path.write_text('\n'.join(json.dumps(i, ensure_ascii=False) for i in items) + ('\n' if items else ''), encoding='utf-8')

msg_log = Path('governance/messages/managed_channel_messages.jsonl')
existing = msg_log.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if msg_log.exists() else ''
for result_path in processed:
    result = json.loads(Path(result_path).read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    msg = {
      'message_id':'MSG-' + result['result_id'],
      'task_id':result['task_id'],
      'trace_id':'bem892_contour_processing',
      'source_object':'OBJ-WRK-001',
      'source_curator':'EL-CUR-WRK-001',
      'target_object':'OBJ-DIR-001',
      'target_curator':'EL-CUR-DIR-001',
      'message_type':'result',
      'payload_ref':result_path,
      'created_at_utc3':'2026-05-30T06:49:00+03:00',
      'rule_refs':['RULE-006','RULE-011','RULE-012'],
      'status':'recorded'
    }
    existing += json.dumps(msg, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n'
msg_log.write_text(existing, encoding='utf-8')

if not processed:
    errors.append('no inbox tasks processed')
for contour in ['WRK-C1','WRK-C2','WRK-C3']:
    if not any('/' + contour + '/' in p for p in processed):
        errors.append(contour + ': no result')
status = 'PASS' if not errors else 'FAIL'

tool = '''# BEM-892 contour processing validator
import json
from pathlib import Path
errors = []
for contour in ["WRK-C1","WRK-C2","WRK-C3"]:
    results = list((Path("governance/worker/results") / contour).glob("RES-*.json"))
    if not results:
        errors.append(f"{contour}: result missing")
queue = Path("governance/dispatch/dispatch_queue.jsonl")
if queue.exists():
    for item in [json.loads(x) for x in queue.read_text(encoding="utf-8").splitlines() if x.strip()]:
        if item.get("status") != "completed":
            errors.append(f"{item.get('dispatch_id')}: not completed")
print("PASS" if not errors else "FAIL")
for err in errors:
    print(err)
raise SystemExit(0 if not errors else 1)
'''
Path('governance/tools/validate_contour_processing.py').write_text(tool, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM892_CONTOUR_PROCESSING_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-892 contour processing proof\nStatus: ' + status + '\nProcessed: ' + str(len(processed)) + '\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
Path('governance/reports/BEM892_CONTOUR_PROCESSING.md').write_text('# BEM-892 Contour processing\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nProcessed results: ' + str(len(processed)) + '\n\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.extend(['governance/dispatch/dispatch_queue.jsonl','governance/messages/managed_channel_messages.jsonl','governance/tools/validate_contour_processing.py','governance/reports/BEM892_CONTOUR_PROCESSING.md',str(marker)] + processed)
ops_applied.append('BEM892 contour processing ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
